plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: DestinaPH uses your location to show distances to recommended places and routes on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: DestinaPH uses your photo library so you can set your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: DestinaPH uses the camera so you can take a profile picture.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DestinaPH uses your location to show distance to destinations and routes on the map.
